properties.SQL Statement:
INSERT INTO FACT_ORDER_ITEM (
    CUSTOMER_SK,
    ORDER_SK,
    PRODUCT_SK,
    SELLER_SK,
    ORDER_ITEM_ID,
    PRICE,
    PRICE_BUCKET,
    FREIGHT_VALUE,
    ITEM_TOTAL_VALUE,
    IS_WEEKEND_PURCHASE,
    IS_LATE_DELIVERY
) VALUES (${CustomerSK}, ${OrderSK}, ${ProductSK}, ${SellerSK}, ${OrderItemID}, ${Price}, '${PriceBucket}', ${FreightValue}, ${TotalValue}, ${IsWeekendPurchase:ifElse('1', '0')}, ${IsLateDelivery:ifElse('1', '0')})

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT 
    (SELECT p.PRODUCT_SK FROM DIM_PRODUCT p 
    WHERE  p.PRODUCT_ID = '${ProductID}'
    ) AS PRODUCT_SK,

    (SELECT s.SELLER_SK FROM DIM_SELLER s
    WHERE  s.SELLER_ID = '${SellerID}'
    ) AS SELLER_SK,

    (SELECT c.CUSTOMER_SK FROM DIM_CUSTOMER c
    WHERE  c.CUSTOMER_ID = '${CustomerID}'
    ) AS CUSTOMER_SK,

    (SELECT o.ORDER_SK FROM DIM_ORDER o
    WHERE  o.ORDER_ID = '${OrderID}'
    ) AS ORDER_SK
FROM DUAL

SELECT oi.ORDER_ID,
oi.PRODUCT_ID,
oi.SELLER_ID,
oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID,
o.CUSTOMER_ID,
oi.PRICE,
oi.FREIGHT_VALUE,
o.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP,
o.ORDER_ESTIMATED_DELIVERY_DATE,
o.ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE
FROM ORDER_ITEMS oi
INNER JOIN ORDERS o ON oi.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID
